name: code-companion
description: Th3rdAI Code Companion — powered by local Ollama LLMs

scripts.electron:build: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac:release: npm run build && MAC_DISTRIBUTION_SIGN=1 electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win:release: npm run build && WIN_DISTRIBUTION_SIGN=1 electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:release: npm run build && LINUX_GPG_SIGN=1 electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win-linux-x64: npm run build && electron-builder --win --linux --x64 --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.electron:publish:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:mac:release: npm run build && MAC_DISTRIBUTION_SIGN=1 electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:win:release: npm run build && WIN_DISTRIBUTION_SIGN=1 electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.electron:publish:linux:release: npm run build && LINUX_GPG_SIGN=1 electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/unit/*.test.js tests/rate-limit.test.js tests/mcp-security.test.js tests/tone-validation.test.js tests/ui-labels.test.js
scripts.validate:static: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check
scripts.validate:fast: npm run validate:static && npx vite build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && node scripts/smoke-test-server.js
